title: launchCaseCollectionByTargetRequest
description: Schema for launchCaseCollectionByTargetRequest in Nuix ECC REST API

caseId.description: id of the case within which to start a collection

targetId.description: id of the Target to use for sources

configurationId.description: id of the collection configuration to use for collection criteria

location.description: destination of the collection (if blank uses the destination from the specified collection configuration)
